top_signals.title: Tesla Holder Merz Sits Out SpaceX IPO in Bet on Musk Merger Bid
top_signals.summary: Alexandra Merz, a longtime Tesla Inc. investor, said she deliberately avoided buying shares in SpaceX’s initial public offering because she expects Elon Musk to move quickly to combine the two companies.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Baroness Hogg has been reappointed as a non-executive member of the Office for Budget Responsibility.
top_signals.summary: Baroness Hogg has been reappointed as a non-executive member of the Office for Budget Responsibility.

top_signals.title: Consumption tax cut on groceries could do more harm than good
top_signals.summary: It could lead to less confidence in Japan's fiscal state, a weaker yen, higher rates and slower economic growth.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.
